tools.name: act_prep
tools.description: Use this when the user asks for ACT practice but does not specify a section. It randomly chooses English, Math, Reading, or Science. After the user confirms, call the corresponding practice tool (practice_english, practice_math, practice_reading, or practice_science).

tools.name: practice_english
tools.description: Generate an interactive ACT English practice set with passages, multiple-choice questions, explanations, and answer tracking.

tools.name: practice_math
tools.description: Generate an interactive ACT Math practice set with diagrams, multiple-choice questions, explanations, and answer tracking.

tools.name: practice_reading
tools.description: Generate an interactive ACT Reading practice set with passages, multiple-choice questions, explanations, and answer tracking.

tools.name: practice_science
tools.description: Generate an interactive ACT Science practice set with passages, diagrams, multiple-choice questions, explanations, and answer tracking.
